---
toc: false
page-layout: custom
---

::: landing-page-block
::::: hero-text
::::::: text-center
![](_extensions/seedcase-project/seedcase-theme/logos/propagate/icon.svg){fig-alt="Seedcase
Propagate logo." width="150px"}

![](_extensions/seedcase-project/seedcase-theme/logos/propagate/font.svg){fig-alt="Seedcase
Propagate font." height="50px"}

## {{< meta tagline >}}

[Overview](/docs/index.qmd){.btn .about-link} [Explore
guide](/docs/guide/index.qmd){.btn .about-link} [See
examples](/docs/examples/index.qmd){.btn .about-link}
:::::::
:::::
:::

::: landing-page-block
::::: {#hero-heading}
{{< include /docs/includes/_badges.qmd >}}
:::::
:::

::: hero-banner
::::: landing-page-block
::::::: hero-text
Propagate is a data requesision system hosted on a website that help researchers
access and (re)use data stored in some meta-data format, such as
[Flower](https://flower.seedcase-project.org) combined with [Data
Package](https://datapackage.org/) metadata. The data owner also gets equipped
with a command-line interface (CLI) for managing, checking and executing the
data requisitions.

## :sparkles: Key features

*Data requester:*

- Request data from a Flower's webpage and Data Package's `datapackage.json`
  file.
- Upload data requesisions to the appropriate data owner in a reproducible and
  structured format.

*Data Owner*

- Reciev reproducible and query-ready instructions for your data resource.
- Test the compatibility of the data request query against your meta-data.
- Generate a new resource, in the format of a .parquet file, based on the unique
  request a user has uploaded.

Propagate focuses on ease of accessibility and reusing data. For use in
combination with the Data Package format, see our Python package
[Flower](https://flower.seedcase-project.org).
:::::::
:::::
:::

::: landing-page-block
::::: hero-text
## About the Seedcase Project

Propagate is part of the [**Seedcase Project**](https://seedcase-project.org),
which helps research projects manage and process data in line with the
[FAIR](https://www.go-fair.org/fair-principles/) principles.

::::::: text-center
[Check out Seedcase](https://seedcase-project.org/){.btn .about-link} [Explore
the
template](https://template-data-package.seedcase-project.org/){.btn
.about-link}
:::::::
:::::
:::

::: hero-banner
::::: landing-page-block
::::::: hero-text
## Want to contribute?

We would love your feedback or contributions! Head over to the [GitHub
repository]({{< meta links.github >}}) to share your ideas or contribute code.
Your input makes us better!
:::::::
:::::
:::
